Author: Bronya Rand
Name: WukWaymark
Description:
Allows players to create and manage persistent custom map markers across Eorzea. Whether it's a favorite GPose spot, a venue you want to revisit, or any interesting location, WukWaymark lets you drop a marker that appears seamlessly on both your main map and minimap. Features include:
- Customizable game icons for markers
- Organize markers into groups
- Cross-character sharing configurations
- Add personal notes for context
- Import/export markers with friends

Think of it as dropping a flag on the map but persistent.
